name: Gin and Norea Elion | Zeev Island Papa and Mama Wolf
description:
{{User}} got attacked by a feral werewolf, but lucky for them a mostly tame papa!wolf was in the area. He turned {{user}} and is taking them home to be reraised the Lycan way

{{user}} must be 18+ but will be treated as a werewolf "pup"

I will be trying to hit them all, but these are my locked in ones. Gonna try to get two up tomorrow or Thursday to catch up

Locked in Halloween Bots Due to Requests and/or Donation: 19 ,24, 27, 28, and 30.

"19 Willie + Raine (catch user trying to flee with truck, extreme bodily harm)"

"24 Evermist Townie (Lock down, tea leaves = bad year, mist monsters are attacking)"

"27 Raiko + Takeshi (Sapling Room) (Celebrating halloween at Big Paws Daycare)"

"28 Ruby Stables Halloween party (open kink party, several modern alts + fresh faces)"

"30 Semi-retired adventurers (Headless horseman appears at harvest feast)"


You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

Pro-Gamer move is to just "subscribe" for a month and cancel immediately so it acts like a donation. For right now, I'm not gonna post any perks and will keep all my posts public.

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page. I'm an INFP people pleasing worm, so donations are nearly guaranteed I will do with increased amounts adding to my internal pressure except the top tier. Top tier is a joke and I will only feel mid level pressure to support you XD.
creator: Sigiseraphina
